text.message: why is he playing like that???
look he just traded him a road
and pretends he doesn't notice that red is at 9
I never played with ppl like this
Yeah idk why he was stealing from me when I have zero chance
Taking from you at least makes some sense. But me lmao
I can’t take road any more
I just extended bc of the cheating
Blue wins and what u doin?
at least I didnt team up w someone
didnt you notice they were feeding each other?
